task_completion.description: Log into ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus dashboard or interface is visible in the browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Azure AD tenant configuration section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the 'Add Tenant' or 'Azure AD' configuration page within ADAudit Plus.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified Azure AD tenant name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'northwindtraders.onmicrosoft.com' is visible in the Tenant Name input field.
The text 'd87c3e2a-4f5b-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f' is visible in the Application (Client) ID input field.
The Client Secret field is filled (may be masked with dots/asterisks) or the text 'N7~3_X9.V-P2~kM5~jR8_wL4.qT1~sZ6' is visible if unmasked.
A save/add button is clicked, a confirmation message appears, or an error message regarding connection validation failure is shown after attempting to save the configuration.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ADAudit Plus web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the ADAudit Plus application at localhost:8081, not API calls via terminal or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not just type the configuration details into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The tenant name, client ID, and client secret are entered into the actual ADAudit Plus web forms.

integrity.description: The agent attempted to save the configuration within the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The save action or resulting validation error is shown within the ADAudit Plus UI, not mocked or bypassed.
